item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:

🟡 TAF LFOT 131100Z 1312/1412 26015KT 9999 BKN030 TEMPO 1315/1318 26015G30KT PROB40 TEMPO 1316/1319 26015G25KT 4000 SHRA BKN020TCU PROB40 TEMPO 1410/1412 4000 SHRA BKN020CB
